overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in ancient Greek attire exploring a sunlit classical city. The character walks through cobblestone streets around a circular temple (tholos), passes monumental statues, and ascends a grand staircase toward an acropolis, with Mediterranean architecture and bright natural lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley ascending to temple terrace

events.description: turns left at top of stairs onto curved path around temple

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stone stairs through narrow passage between buildings toward the circular temple

notable_agents.action: small child sitting on the ground near the wall

entered.detail: large round temple with columns and red decorative bands
wide stone staircase leading upward between buildings
stone building facade with wooden door and red trim
stone wall with lattice pattern top
large ceramic urn with leaf patterns containing red flowers

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow stone alley, ascending a wide staircase toward a circular temple visible ahead. The passage is flanked by stone buildings and walls, with a large decorated urn and minimal vegetation visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved cobblestone street wrapping around temple perimeter

events.description: exits narrow alley onto open curved street with hanging banners

agents.ego_description: walking along curved cobblestone path around the circular temple perimeter, passing under hanging banners

notable_agents.action: child running along the street toward the camera

entered.detail: red and gold fabric banners strung across the street overhead
wooden wheeled cart parked on the left side of the street
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the temple wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a sunlit curved street wrapping around the circular temple. Hanging banners stretch overhead between buildings, while cypress trees line the temple walls. A wooden cart sits parked on the left as the path continues to curve around the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: main processional street leading to distant archway

events.description: mounted rider on horse gallops past from right to left across the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide cobblestone street toward a distant archway, sharing the road with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: mounted rider galloping on horse from right to left across the path

entered.detail: stone archway structure spanning the street in the distance
multi-story stone buildings with tiled roofs lining the street
large stone statues of warriors on pedestals flanking the street

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a wide processional street toward a distant stone archway. Other pedestrians walk along the path, and a mounted rider suddenly gallops across from right to left. Large warrior statues on pedestals begin to appear along the right side of the avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple plaza with monumental statues and colonnade

events.description: enters open plaza area with large statues and approaches temple colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking around the temple plaza, passing large statues and approaching the columned entrance of the circular temple

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green tunic walking past the character

entered.detail: the circular temple now viewed from the front with tall fluted columns
tall ionic columns with red bands supporting the temple roof
decorative urn with red flowers at temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand plaza dominated by the circular temple's colonnade. Large warrior statues on pedestals line the approach, and the character walks along the temple's columned facade, passing other pedestrians and decorative urns at the entrance.

events.description: turns left and begins ascending grand staircase flanked by horse statues

agents.ego_description: turning toward and climbing a wide monumental staircase flanked by equestrian statues

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with many steps ascending steeply upward
bronze horse statues on stone pedestals flanking the stairs
decorative stone balustrades along the staircase sides

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the temple and approaches a monumental staircase ascending toward the upper city. Large bronze horse statues flank the wide stone steps as the character begins the climb, with red banners visible at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow stone alleyway into the expansive, sun-drenched heart of a classical city. It begins by ascending a wide staircase flanked by stone walls and decorated urns, moving toward a circular temple that gradually comes into view. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene opens onto a curved, sunlit street where hanging banners stretch overhead and cypress trees line the temple walls. The path then expands into a wide processional avenue, passing a galloping rider and towering warrior statues before flowing into a grand plaza dominated by the temple's colonnade. Finally, the camera turns away from the temple to approach a monumental staircase, ascending toward the upper city between large bronze horse statues and red banners.
